summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Electric Potential and Voltage is a key topic in Electrostatics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of electric potential and voltage.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding electric potential and voltage has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
